title: Tabs
description: An accessible tab set with complete keyboard, focus and ARIA relationships.
limitations: The pinned Core and Smart sources do not provide the complete accepted accessibility contract.
Docara has no admitted tabs manifest or runtime lock record.

gap.reason: Keyboard focus movement, Home and End behaviour, stable tab-panel ARIA linkage and an admitted manifest are incomplete.
gap.fallback: Use headings and source-ordered sequential sections.
gap.admission_condition: Publish a canonical accessible tabs contract and manifest, pin a new immutable Framework pair and provider revision, then pass Docara schema, asset, rendering and browser acceptance.
